Bug / Task Description: bipartite_sets and two_color raise ValueError for valid bipartite graphs and silently accept graphs containing odd cycles. The 2-coloring check compares neighbor colors with the wrong operator, so conflict detection fires when the two sides have different colors (which is the expected state) and misses the actual error case of same-colored neighbors. Fix the coloring validation so that ValueError is raised on odd cycles and valid bipartite graphs are processed correctly.
Commit Subject: fix(bipartite): raise ValueError on conflicting colors, not matching colors
